protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: Fresh detergent stock solution was added... kept on hot plate stirrers to maintain 120 RPM agitation and 37C during the lysis process

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: Fresh detergent stock solutions were added... agitation and temperature at 37C... cell lysate was ready as the loading material for at-scale clarification

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: detergent is introduced during lysis, which is followed by clarification of the cell lysate, chromatographic capture and polishing steps
